def positive_validation_rules_duplicated_at_dto_and_domain_layer():
    rule_id = "validation_rules_duplicated_at_dto_and_domain_layer"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Identical validation constraint is applied at both the DTO/schema layer and the domain entity layer."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
